view.title: Yearly planner
monthlyDaySheet.title: {date} notes
header.cyclePlannerViewHint: Cycles: yearly calendar → month grid → month list → yearly
header.clickToEnterMonthYear: Click to enter month and year
modal.displayTitleHint: For planner file names (date or range), the title becomes the name suffix. Otherwise it is saved as frontmatter title.
modal.titleRenameConflict: A file with that name already exists; title was not changed.
modal.suffixAsTitle: Suffix is used as the file title (#)
modal.notifyTimeDesc: Local time on the event day (saved as notify_minutes in frontmatter). Leave empty for no reminder.
modal.chipColorTitle: Chip color (hex, rgb, or color name)
modal.dateChangeConflict: A file already exists for that date.
modal.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
settings.plannerFolderDesc: Folder for yearly planner date notes
settings.monthLabelsDesc: Display format for month headers (1월–12월 or Jan–Dec)
settings.showHolidaysDesc: Display public holidays in the yearly planner
settings.mobileBottomPaddingDesc: Padding (rem) at bottom of yearly planner on mobile so the table is not covered by the tools tab. 0 to disable.
settings.mobileCellWidthDesc: Width (rem) of month cells on mobile. 0 to use default (4.5rem / 4rem by breakpoint).
chipDrag.targetExists: A file already exists for that date.
plannerClipboard.emptyCopy: Nothing to copy — select a date or note with Cmd/Ctrl+click.
plannerClipboard.copyFailed: Could not copy to the clipboard.
plannerClipboard.pasteInvalid: Clipboard does not contain planner notes from this plugin.
plannerClipboard.pasteNoTarget: Select at least one date (Cmd/Ctrl+click) before pasting.
plannerClipboard.pasteMultiConflict: Paste either one copied note to multiple dates, or multiple notes to a single date.
plannerClipboard.deleteNothing: No notes to delete in the current selection.
plannerClipboard.deleteConfirmDesc:
{count} file(s) will be moved to the trash:

{paths}
plannerClipboard.undoNothing: No planner paste to undo in this view.
plannerClipboard.undoSuccess: Undo paste: moved {count} note(s) to trash.
plannerClipboard.undoMissingFiles: Undo paste: those files are no longer at the saved paths.
